channel.title: STEVEM
channel.description: My name is Stevem, not STEVE, M. Stevemmmm as in Steven with an "m'. I make Video Essays about Animation History that focus on the old, obscure and Japanese. Sometimes I make videos about Japanese music. https://stevem.gimmeswag.com
channel.itunes:author: STEVEM
channel.itunes:subtitle: STEVEM
channel.itunes:summary: My name is Stevem, not STEVE, M. Stevemmmm as in Steven with an "m'. I make Video Essays about Animation History that focus on the old, obscure and Japanese. Sometimes I make videos about Japanese music. https://stevem.gimmeswag.com

item.title: Miyazaki HATES AI? #ghibli
item.description: Hayao Miyazaki may not have called it an insult, but that doesn't make hima fan. Follow me on Twitter for Updates on Videos- https://twitter.com/the_stevem SUPPORT ME HERE- https://www.patreon.com/stevemmmmm AND HERE - paypal.me/stevemmmmm All Sources In the Pinned Comments

item.itunes:subtitle: Miyazaki HATES AI? #ghibli

item.title: The Ghibli AI DISASTER
item.description: Open AIs new image generator now makes awful ghibli ai art... Follow me on Twitter for Updates on Videos- https://twitter.com/the_stevem SUPPORT ME HERE- https://www.patreon.com/stevemmmmm AND HERE - paypal.me/stevemmmmm All Sources In the Pinned Comments https://docs.google.com/document/d/1giQBCoYMMsF3dPPq3s2cMnlUKh-CBd6ZW6H2dvRh_Do/edit?usp=sharing #ghibli #aiart #hayaomiyazaki
